title: BatteryMetadata
description: Canonical description of an EV battery pack. This is the single source of truth for battery attributes across ml/, backend/, and frontend/ - none of these layers may hardcode a fixed list of supported pack sizes or chemistries. Any pack whose metadata validates against this schema is accepted; packs far outside the training distribution are still accepted but must be flagged with a low confidence score and an explicit limitations statement by the Prediction Agent, never silently treated as equivalent to in-distribution packs.

battery_id.description: Unique identifier for this battery pack/dataset upload.

manufacturer.description: e.g. 'Tesla', 'LG Energy Solution'. Free text - not an enum, new manufacturers must not require a schema change.

nominal_capacity_kwh.description: Rated pack energy capacity in kWh. Deliberately unconstrained (no min/max/enum) so any EV pack size - 24 through 100+ kWh and beyond - is representable without a schema or code change.

chemistry.description: Cell chemistry family. 'Other' is a valid, non-error value for chemistries not yet explicitly enumerated.

cycle_count_at_upload.description: Known charge/discharge cycle count at the time the dataset was captured, if available.

notes.description: Free-text field for anything not captured structurally (e.g. known damage, non-standard usage).
